answer: Great news — all three dishes currently available to you are shellfish-free! [4] You can enjoy the Toro Truffle Roll (fatty tuna with black truffle), the Otoro Selection (aged bluefin belly nigiri), or the Ikura Don (salmon roe rice bowl). [4] Please note that our kitchen handles shellfish, so cross-contact is possible — if your allergy is serious, we recommend confirming with the shop directly before ordering.

recommendations.name: Toro Truffle Roll
recommendations.why: The Toro Truffle Roll contains only fish allergens — no shellfish — making it a safe and luxurious shellfish-free choice. [1]

recommendations.name: Otoro Selection
recommendations.why: The Otoro Selection is tagged with fish only, so it's free of shellfish and offers a rich, melt-in-the-mouth bluefin belly experience. [2]

recommendations.name: Ikura Don
recommendations.why: The Ikura Don carries fish and soy allergens but no shellfish, making it a comforting shellfish-free rice bowl option. [3]
